branding.title: CVerify
branding.description: Plan, book, and explore custom itineraries designed in seconds by advanced intelligence. Experience travel re-imagined.
branding.journeyPrompt: Your journey begins with a single prompt.

misc.copyright: © 2026 CVerify AI Inc. All rights reserved.

landing.headline: Decoupled Role-Based Security for modern TravelTech.
landing.description: CVerify AI integrates Zustand state hydration, edge JWT cryptography, anti-CSRF protections, Broadcast session syncing, and inactivity warning locks.

roles.userDesc: Standard traveler dashboard giving full access to planning, searching prompts, and reviewing personal travel history details.
roles.businessDesc: Partner dashboard to manage hotel packages, list excursions, and evaluate incoming travelers reservation revenue pools.
roles.adminDesc: Global system control dashboard offering server health diagnostic analytics, account registries, and direct API lock gates.

landing.footerNote: CVerify AI Auth Portal Integration. Verified for Next.js 16 + HeroUI v3 + Tailwind v4.
